3295080baa59324e895f9f68cb5761ac612c64b9.merged_text: Daily completion (R1): a submission for date D is completed when the daily rep is submitted AND all three check-in ratings (effort, focus, support) are submitted, and requires at least one habit-checklist item to be checked; a submission with the rep and all three ratings but zero checklist items checked is NOT counted as complete.

730976ca2b559ba6286394296dcf9582f126515f.merged_text: Daily completion: a submission for date D is completed when the daily rep is submitted and all three check-in ratings are submitted; the habit checklist does not affect completion, and this is implemented as team_app/completion.py:completion_status(submission), returning True only when the rep is present and all three ratings are non-None, verified green by tests/test_completion.py.

beed7e66eb521981b23e434928ac4cfb9eb25bc0.merged_text: The user likes cheese pizza and loves chicken pizza.
